title: TierX
description:
🔹 TierX — The Ultimate Player Tier System Plugin
TierX is a highly customizable and stylish plugin that allows server admins to assign, manage, and display player tiers with stunning gradients, bold symbols, particles, sounds, and full support for tablist
body:
💠 TierX — The Ultimate Player Tier System Plugin
TierX is a powerful and fully customizable Minecraft plugin that allows server administrators to create immersive, rank-based gameplay experiences using a tier system. Designed for modern Minecraft servers (Paper, Spigot, and Folia), TierX provides flexible control over player tiers, stunning gradient formatting, and seamless PlaceholderAPI integration.

✨ Features:
🌀 Full PlaceholderAPI Support — Easily integrate player tiers into your tablist, scoreboard, chat, and other plugins. Show off dynamic placeholders like %tierx_tier%.

💠 Beautiful Tier Prefixes — Customize each tier with gradient colors, emojis, bold symbols, and stylish brackets like HT5.

⚔️ Group-Based Styling — Separate tier styles per group (e.g., cpvp, smp, nethpot) with unique colors, symbols (💠, ⚔, 🧪), and effects.

🔊 Custom Sounds & Particles — Celebrate promotions with configurable sounds and particle effects.

🧠 Persistent Storage — Tiers are saved automatically in a tiers.yml file and loaded on server startup.

🔁 /tier reload Command — Instantly apply config changes without restarting the server.

🧩 Configurable via config.yml — This feature will be fully available in TierX1.1 or TierX1.2. Stay tuned!

📜 Placeholder Support Everywhere — Use tier placeholders in any compatible plugin:
– Chat plugins
– Scoreboard/Tablist plugins
– GUI menus
– Nametags and holograms

🧪 Sample Placeholder:
%tierx_tier% – Returns the player's tier (e.g., HT3)

**💡 This plugin requires PlaceholderAPI v2.11.6 or higher.
Download it from: https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/**

**This is a beta version of TierX. There might be some bugs, which will be fixed in TierX1.1.
💬 Have questions? Tag me on Discord: shubham96__
Or join the support server: https://discord.gg/XqYQyJteaJ**
